About: It is about a competition or test of the working abilities of herding dogs.
Affects: It affects the way dogs are handled.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with international and national cynological and sports organisations.
It is associated with associations of sheep- and cattle-breeders.
BelongsTo: It belongs to the category of herding events.
ConsistsOf: It consists of several levels of difficulty.
It consists of various scoring systems.
It consists of guiding the sheep through several obstacles.
It consists of collecting sheep in and out of the pen.
It consists of separating the sheep from the flock.
It consists of gathering herding style.
It consists of traditional herding style.
It consists of fetching and driving tests.
It consists of shedding, singling and penning.
CreatedFor: It was created for testing the working abilities of herding dogs.
CreatedIn: It was created in New Zealand.
It was created in the United Kingdom.
CreatedTo: It was created to demonstrate basic herding management skills.
DevelopedIn: It was developed in the United Kingdom.
It was developed in north-west England.
FoundedIn: It was founded in north-west England.
HasA: It has dogs demonstrating basic herding management skills.
It has sheep to be herded.
It has other animals including ducks or cows that may also be used.
It has several levels of difficulty.
It has various scoring systems.
It has rules varying concerning eligible breeds.
It has rules varying concerning numbers of dogs.
It has rules varying concerning which breeds of sheep are to be used.
It has a competition programme including guiding the sheep through several obstacles.
